title: FEAR
description: [1.20.1] The Ultimate Horror Modpack! Herobrine is watching you, Dwellers are chasing you and giant spiders are hunting you.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/658ce72ff0c7c7fd346c1b2edbb1e78ac766af10.png)
# ABOUT
The Ultimate Horror Modpack! Herobrine is watching you, dwellers are chasing you and giant spiders are hunting you. Inspired by popular From The Fog by Calvin and Fear Nightfall by LunaPixel Studios. 
![BH](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/ca28c1bd-8c0e-4625-bda1-43965a48650c.webp)
# FEATURES
* Fully Optimized with Shader Support
* Many different horror elements and jump scares
* Herobrine
* Witherstorm
* Dwellers (Cave Dweller, Man From The Fog, Slender Man, Goat Man, Midnight Lurker and more)
* New scary arthropod variants, including spiders, moths, centipedes and the Spider Moth boss
* Passive mobs fight back, zombies mine blocks and creepers breach walls
* A ritual magic system centered around summonable spirits (Occultism)
* Completely Overhauled World Generation (Biomes O' Plenty)
* New Dungeons & Structures (Graveyard, Horror Elements)
* Realistic food gathering (Butcher's Delight)
* Realistic tree chopping (Dynamic Trees)
* Enhanced Visuals and Hysteria Sharders
* Many Custom Features for an Improved Experience
* Built-in, Free World Sharing (e4mc)
* 100+ Mods

# MY MODPACKS
* [Rising Legends](https://modrinth.com/modpack/rl-craft) [1.20.1] RLCraft Recreated For Modern Minecraft Versions.
* [Arcane Dragons [FABRIC]](https://modrinth.com/modpack/arcanedragons) [1.21.1] Dragons and Magic. The ultimate fantasy world!
* [Arcane Dragons [NEOFORGE]](https://modrinth.com/modpack/arcane-dragons) [1.21.1] Dragons and Magic. The ultimate fantasy world!
* [Dragon Realm [FABRIC]](https://modrinth.com/modpack/dragon-realm) [1.20.1] Dragons, dungeons and bosses.
* [Dragon Realm [FORGE]](https://modrinth.com/modpack/dragon-realm-forge) [1.20.1] Dragons, dungeons and bosses.
* [FEAR](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fear) [1.20.1] The Ultimate Horror Modpack.
* [The Better Vanilla](https://modrinth.com/modpack/better-vanilla-fabric) [1.21.X] Vanilla with improved visuals and performance.

# VIDEOS
Send me your videos on Discord and you will be featured here.
